title: Managing_Models
text:
- weight: 100
            podAffinityTerm:
              labelSelector:
                matchExpressions:
                - key: group
                  operator: In
                  values:
                  - kimi-bw-vllm
              topologyKey: kubernetes.io/hostname
      containers:
      - args:
        - |
          RANK=0
          MASTER_ADDR="kimi-bw-vllm-head-0.kimi-bw-vllm-master.nrp-llm.svc.cluster.local"
